name: Burkhart, Edgar Carl Moritz
description: Burk returned to school with a wife this year, but still found time to mingle with the boys. Evidence—Senior party.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Burk returned to school with a wife this year, but still found time to mingle with the boys. Evidence—Senior party.

name: Chavez, Raul
description: How many revolutions per minute? Ask Raul, he's from Mexico, the birthplace of revolutions.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: How many revolutions per minute? Ask Raul, he's from Mexico, the birthplace of revolutions.

name: Clark, Howell Smith
description: The Von Hindenburg of the M. S. M. army. The freshmen soon become pacifists under the Captain's iron discipline.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: The Von Hindenburg of the M. S. M. army. The freshmen soon become pacifists under the Captain's iron discipline.

name: Doennecke, Henry William
description: Henry believed that every professor is wrong until proven right.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Henry believed that every professor is wrong until proven right.

name: Duga, Joseph Benjamin
description: The American "U"-boat—used Starkey for a periscope.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: The American "U"-boat—used Starkey for a periscope.

name: Flanders, Jerome Emerson
description: "Germany" won fame by heroic conduct at several fires last year.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Germany" won fame by heroic conduct at several fires last year.

name: Geib, Francis Hodgson
description: "John" don't know what M. S. M. will do when he leaves to whip the Kaiser.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "John" don't know what M. S. M. will do when he leaves to whip the Kaiser.

name: Goldman, Leon Harrison
description: "Mike" hopes to rival George Cohen some day in theatrical glory.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Mike" hopes to rival George Cohen some day in theatrical glory.

name: Golick, Anthony Frank
description: Tony helped the Frisco out of insolvency. He now has a boss.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Tony helped the Frisco out of insolvency. He now has a boss.

name: Gotsch, Oscar Jr.
description: "Graflex" loves his "eats." He also digs, but starves without pretzels.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Graflex" loves his "eats." He also digs, but starves without pretzels.

name: Hansen, Knud Fabricius
motto: "George" has the degree of Cand. Phil. from the University of Copenhagen. Nuff sed.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "George" has the degree of Cand. Phil. from the University of Copenhagen. Nuff sed.

name: Housholder, Earl Ross
motto: "The Dog" is one of the Gold Dust Twins, but he deals in luck. Came from Case three years ago.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "The Dog" is one of the Gold Dust Twins, but he deals in luck. Came from Case three years ago.

name: Maness, Orie Newell
motto: "Freshman" has a "toothbrush" and a vocabulary, and almost is a professor. "See Bill Durning."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Freshman" has a "toothbrush" and a vocabulary, and almost is a professor. "See Bill Durning."

name: Mellow, George
motto: "Flossie" is one of our stars, but he came here from the dark.
clubs: Junior American Society of Mechanical Engineers
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Flossie" is one of our stars, but he came here from the dark.

name: Morris, John Munson
motto: "Razorback" is an incurable fusser. Also shark in Descriptive Geometry.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Razorback" is an incurable fusser. Also shark in Descriptive Geometry.

name: Felipe, Buenaventura Ore
description: "Irish" has attended La Escuela Tecnica de Comercio away down in wonderful Peru.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Irish" has attended La Escuela Tecnica de Comercio away down in wonderful Peru.

name: William, Clark Powell
description: "Pete" never has been outside of Rolla, but Westinghouse is rushing him.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Pete" never has been outside of Rolla, but Westinghouse is rushing him.

name: William, Houston Reber
description: "Bill" divides his attentions between the surveying department and the Rollamo. Is very fond of the Four Hundred.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Bill" divides his attentions between the surveying department and the Rollamo. Is very fond of the Four Hundred.

name: Michael, Shanfeld
description: "Mike," another product of the big city, initiates the Sophs into the guessing contest called Mineralogy.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Mike," another product of the big city, initiates the Sophs into the guessing contest called Mineralogy.

name: Horace, Reynolds Stahl
description: "Pete" hails from Quincy, Ill., and frequently demonstrates his ability to "tickle the ivories." Is noted for his entertaining stories.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Pete" hails from Quincy, Ill., and frequently demonstrates his ability to "tickle the ivories." Is noted for his entertaining stories.

name: Starkey, Alvan Chapman
description: The "long boy" came to us from the Colorado School of Mines and is fond of telling how they do it at Golden.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: The "long boy" came to us from the Colorado School of Mines and is fond of telling how they do it at Golden.

name: Weimer, Raymond Samuel
description: "Judge" wears one of the noted "tooth brushes" and is a chip off the old block.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Judge" wears one of the noted "tooth brushes" and is a chip off the old block.

name: Wilson, Eldred Dewey
description: "Woodrow" is a product of the Ozarks, claiming Rolla as his residence. Always attends mass-meetings and Senior parties.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Woodrow" is a product of the Ozarks, claiming Rolla as his residence. Always attends mass-meetings and Senior parties.

name: Zeuch, Walter Charles
description: Hails from the big city east of here and is Blackwood's able assistant. Made his "M" in baseball.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Hails from the big city east of here and is Blackwood's able assistant. Made his "M" in baseball.

name: Zoller, Lawrence Joseph
description: Knows the geology of Oklahoma by heart.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Knows the geology of Oklahoma by heart.
